certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No evidence of formal AI risk assessment or impact assessment process
Missing transparency/explainability controls for hybrid decisions
Insufficient performance monitoring and continual improvement mechanisms for AI components
Limited documentation of accountability and human oversight beyond basic escalations
recommendations: Conduct and document AI-specific risk and impact assessments per ISO 42001 Clause 6
Implement decision logging and explainability features for acceptance/invoice triggers
Define quantitative KPIs for AI reliability, escalation effectiveness, and bias monitoring
Establish regular internal audits and management review cycles for the AI system

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No evidence of formal AI risk assessment or impact assessment process
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
